properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One single drop of rain Your salty tear became blue ocean One tiny grain of sand turning in your hand A world in motion You're out beyond the furthest Morning Star Close enough to hold me in Your arms

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Adonai, I lift up my heart and I cry My Adonai You're Maker of each moment Father of my hope and freedom Oh, my Adonai

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One timid faithful knock Resounds upon the Rock of Ages One trembling heart and soul Becomes a servant bold and courageous You call across the mountains and the seas I answer from the deepest part of me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Adonai (Adonai), I lift up my heart and I cry My Adonai You are Maker of each moment Father of my hope and freedom Oh, my Adonai

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, From age to age you reign in Majesty And today You're making miracles in me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Adonai, I lift up my heart and I cry My Adonai, You're Maker of each moment Oh, Father of my hope and freedom Oh, my Adonai
